scenarios.intent: Move PDFs whose names contain invoice into Invoices.

specification.description: Move invoice PDFs into Invoices without overwriting anything.

scenarios.intent: Rename image stems from spaces to lower-case hyphens.

specification.name: Normalize photo names
specification.description: Lower-case and hyphenate image filename stems without changing extensions.

scenarios.intent: Prefix selected files with their last-write year and month.

scenarios.intent: Copy matched files into Review while preserving originals.

specification.name: Copy review documents

scenarios.intent: Ask whether a date-like constant is fixed text or last-write metadata.

questions.prompt: Should the observed date prefix be fixed text or come from each file's last-write year and month?

options.label: Keep the demonstrated prefix as fixed text
Prefix each filename with its last-write year and month

scenarios.intent: Reject deletion, content modification, reparse, cross-volume, and overflow evidence.
